theme_strategy.approach: CSS Variables overriding based on data-theme attribute on the root html element.
theme_strategy.custom_theme_support: To support custom accents, update the --primary and --ring variables dynamically via React state injected as a style prop on the app wrapper, e.g., style={{ '--primary': userHex }}.

typography.dynamic_weighting: In the 'Energetic' theme, use uppercase and font-black for headings. In 'Clean Light' and 'Calm Dark', use normal casing and font-semibold/bold.

bento_grid.container: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4 lg:grid-cols-6 gap-4 md:gap-6

layout_and_spacing.padding_scale: p-6 for standard cards, p-8 for hero dashboard widgets. Use generous gap-6 between bento items.
layout_and_spacing.mobile_constraints: Images max-h-[40vh] on mobile. Bento grid collapses strictly to grid-cols-1.

coach_card.concept: The Tracing Beam / Glowing AI Assistant
coach_card.style: relative overflow-hidden rounded-[var(--radius)] p-6 bg-gradient-to-br from-primary/10 to-transparent border border-primary/20
coach_card.accent: Include a subtle blur-md background element behind the icon for a 'glowing' effect.

charts.recommendation: Use Recharts with Tailwind CSS variables. The line chart for weight must use var(--primary) for the stroke, with a subtle area fill below it.
charts.tooltip: Must use the theme's --card background with a 1px border.

progress_ring.style: SVG based. Track is stroke-muted, fill is stroke-primary. Stroke width should be thick (12px) for impact.

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:opacity-90 transition-opacity font-semibold rounded-full px-8 py-3
buttons.energetic_override: In energetic theme, buttons should inherit --radius (0rem) and be uppercase.

motion.interactions: Hover states on cards: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, border-primary/50. Transition: transform 0.2s ease, border-color 0.2s ease.
motion.page_transitions: Fade and slight slide-up (framer-motion) for dashboard content entry.
motion.progress_fill: Progress rings must animate from 0 to target value on load over 1.2s cubic-bezier.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure --primary-foreground has at least 4.5:1 contrast against --primary. For Energetic theme, neon colors must use black text.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute. e.g., data-testid='weight-log-submit', data-testid='theme-toggle-btn', data-testid='unit-toggle'.

auth_backgrounds.description: Silhouette of man jumping on rocky mountain during sunset - fits Energetic theme auth screens
Zen garden with raked sand - fits Clean Light / Calm theme auth screens
Heavy dumbbells on a rack in a dimly lit gym - fits Calm Dark / Energetic theme

instructions_to_main_agent.tech_stack: React, Tailwind CSS, Shadcn/UI, Recharts, Firebase Auth/Firestore.
instructions_to_main_agent.theme_implementation: 1. Add data-theme attribute to <html>. 2. Define CSS variables in index.css for :root (light), [data-theme='dark'], [data-theme='energetic']. 3. For custom colors, inject a <style> tag or apply inline styles to root redefining --primary and --ring.
instructions_to_main_agent.shadcn_customization: Shadcn components use these CSS variables. Do not hardcode colors in the components. Utilize the CSS variable --radius for borders to easily toggle between soft and brutalist styles.
instructions_to_main_agent.icons: Use lucide-react. For the Coach Card, use 'Sparkles' or 'Brain' icon.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing_ids: Strictly add data-testid to every clickable element, input, and significant data container (like the streak counter or current weight display).
